**Subject Line:**  
**"Verify Your Account Details to Prevent Unauthorized Access"**

---

**Email Body:**

**Dear [First Name],**

We hope this message finds you well. We are writing to ensure the security of your account and to prevent any potential unauthorized access. Recently, we detected unusual activity on your account, and to protect your information, we kindly ask you to verify your account details immediately.

**Please click the link below to confirm your account information:**

[Verify Your Account Details](https://www.examplebank.com/verify-account)

**Important:** This verification is required to maintain the security of your account. If you do not verify your details within the next 24 hours, your account may be temporarily suspended for security reasons.

**Please note:** This is a secure link provided by [Example Bank]. Do not share this link with anyone else. If you have any questions, please contact our support team at support@examplebank.com or call us at 1-800-555-1234.

Thank you for your cooperation. We value your trust and are committed to keeping your information safe.

Sincerely,  
**[Example Bank Team]**  
Customer Support
